Colorectal Cancer Screening Tests 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What are colorectal cancer screening tests? 
Colorectal cancer screening tests check for colorectal cancer Â before you have any symptoms. Colorectal cancer is a type of cancer that affects the colon or rectum. The colon makes up most of the large intestine. The rectum is at the end of the large intestine and connects
